articles.title: Submarine attack on Iranian warship off Sri Lanka leaves over 100 missing - ایران اینترنشنال
articles.description: The United States carried out a strike that sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka’s coast in an incident that has triggered a search and rescue operation in the Indian Ocean.
